title: containerd vs Podman
description: Compare containerd vs Podman in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Podman emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, containerd or Podman?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Podman edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. containerd excels at containerd is a developer tools platform that helps Platform Engineers and DevOp, while Podman is stronger for Podman is a developer tools platform that helps Developers and DevOps Engineers .

faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for developer tools. Podman scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which developer tools tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor containerd for large teams, while Podman may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Open Source (Free) pricing.
